post.summary: Exchange long-lived Slack token for rotating tokens
post.description:
One-time exchange of a long-lived ``xoxb-`` bot token for rotating tokens via Slack's ``tooling.tokens.rotate`` API.

**Required environment variables:**

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| ``SLACK_CLIENT_ID`` | Slack app client ID |
| ``SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET`` | Slack app client secret |

The existing ``xoxb-`` token is read from the MongoDB ``slackOAuth`` collection for the given ``team_id``.

After a successful exchange, the new rotating access token, refresh token, and expiry are persisted to the ``slackOAuth`` collection.  Subsequent refreshes happen automatically.

**Note:** This is a one-time operation. Once exchanged, use ``POST /health/slack-token/refresh`` to force a manual refresh.

schema.title: Response Slack Token Exchange Health Slack Token Exchange Post

400.description: Missing required env vars or exchange failed.
